items.title: Beyoncé – “Morning Dew (Donk)”
items.summary: Beyoncé is back. For July 4, she returned with a surprise new song called "Morning Dew (Donk)." It kicks off a 60-day countdown to her birthday in September, which will mark 20 years since the release of her second album B'Day. It will receive a reissue with this track included. The post Beyoncé – “Morning Dew (Donk)” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Zach Bryan Previews Songs From New EP Young Manhood And Other Donatable Organs
items.summary: Zach Bryan is teasing new music on YouTube again, as he is wont to do. The country star is currently on his stadium tour — sadly without MJ Lenderman — promoting January's With Heaven On Top.

items.title: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn’t A Guy At All Anime To Feature Nirvana Theme Song, Dave Grohl Says Kurt Cobain Would’ve Loved The Manga
items.summary: R.I.P. Kurt Cobain, you would've loved The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't A Guy At All, according to Dave Grohl. The manga series (which started on Twitter) is getting turned into an animated series, and details were revealed Friday (July 3) at the Anime Expo in Los Angeles, including that Nirvana's "Breed" will be the opening theme.
